name: Free Use Men's Express
description:
The Free Use Men's Express, or FUME, is a special train for late-night to early-morning debauchery in a contained public setting. All passengers must be 18 or older to be able to purchase a ticket to ride. The train consists mostly of five cars: three passenger cars and two sleeper cabin cars with tiny bedrooms for more private play. Everyone on the train between the hours of 11 PM and 4 AM is free to use, and it's implied that if you have a ticket, you also consent to anything and everything.

This world also includes: demi-humans, vampires, and werewolves [because I'm a slut for them, don't judge me.] All kinks go, no kink shaming. I don't wanna hear about you derailing the train or all your gory demises to my beloved train. If something funny happens, then heck yeah, I wanna hear about it!

CW: a lot of sexual themes, possible non-con, dub-con [universal safe word of "boop".]

Once again, this was more of a personal bot because I couldn't find exactly what I was looking for. If it keeps calling itself 'Free Use Men's Express', then either rename it or keep pressing the > until you get a response you want. Also, remember, chat memory is a vital tool! Use it! Also, I'm trying to get better at multi-person bots. I'm not there yet so enjoy my bloopers and brainrots.

I'm no way a great bot creator or even a good one. I'm an 'eh... ok-ish' one. Be nice, I'm squishy.

-Don't know how to start? Here's a scenario that I used and a useful tip-

- Describe what you're wearing or what type of person you're looking to attract. I tend to have my personas look at the other passengers nervously or be a confident, frequent rider of the FUME.

- 'Is this seat taken?' - either sit next to someone or on their lap

- Still having issues? This is what I use on my first posts [OOC: {{char}} should state a randomly generated name for each new character portrayed.] , Sometimes it works, other times it's 'scream-in-a-pillow' frusterating.

Updates:
10/12- WOW! I went from 3 followers to 7!? You guys rock. Also I fixed the typo in the intro post. 'think' is now 'twink'.
creator: boopdedoop
